title: Verify Engagement section shows acquired content if consumption is < 90%
description: Test that the Engagement section displays the user's acquired content if they have watched less than 90% of it.
preconditions: User has acquired content and watched < 90%
User is on the Trial Corner screen

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the Trial Corner screen

expected_result: The user's previously started content is displayed, with an option to resume watching.
